_meta.description: Small, sourced concept->tradition lexicon that drives the ontology_edge_faithful surface gate. Each concept term is tagged with the tradition it belongs to so the gate can fire on an asserted cross-tradition IDENTITY/SUBSUMPTION (e.g. 'ren is identical to agape') while passing a scoped analogy ('wu wei resembles apatheia'). Keep small, versioned, provenance-tagged; this is a closed-world lexicon, not a truth oracle. See docs/11-Platform/Ontology-Claim-Boundary.md.
_meta.source: Standard reference glosses: ren (Analects/Confucian ethics), agape (NT Greek / Christian theology), wu wei (Dao De Jing / Daoist), apatheia (Stoic / Hellenistic philosophy), nirvana (Buddhist soteriology), moksha (Hindu/Vedantic), li (Confucian ritual propriety), de (Daoist/Confucian virtue-power), karuna (Buddhist compassion), caritas (Latin Christian charity), eudaimonia (Aristotelian flourishing), ataraxia (Epicurean/Pyrrhonist tranquillity).
